mapper.select: SELECT PLACE_NO, PLACE_NAME, PLACE_CATEGORY, PLACE_ADDRESS, PLACE_LATITUDE, PLACE_LONGITUDE, PLACE_RATING, PLACE_NUMBER, PLACE_THUMBNAIL_URL FROM PLACE WHERE PLACE_NO = #{placeNo}
SELECT TM.TAG_NAME FROM PLACE_TAG_MAP PTM JOIN TAG_MASTER TM ON TM.TAG_CODE = PTM.TAG_CODE WHERE PTM.PLACE_NO = #{placeNo} ORDER BY PTM.TAG_WEIGHT DESC, TM.TAG_NAME ASC
SELECT PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL FROM PLACE_REVIEW PR JOIN PHOTO_DATA PD ON PD.COMMENT_NO = PR.COMMENT_NO WHERE PR.PLACE_NO = #{placeNo} AND PD.LOG_PHOTO_URL IS NOT NULL ORDER BY PD.PHOTO_NO DESC
SELECT COMMENT_NO, LOG_NO, PLACE_NO, COMMENT_CONTENT, NVL(CREATED_BY, 'anonymous') AS CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT FROM PLACE_REVIEW WHERE PLACE_NO = #{placeNo} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC, COMMENT_NO DESC

SELECT HOURS_ID, PLACE_NO, DAY_OF_WEEK, OPEN_TIME, CLOSE_TIME, BREAK_STRAT_TIME, BREAK_END_TIME, LAST_ORDER, IS_CLOSED FROM PLACE_HOURS WHERE PLACE_NO = #{placeNo} ORDER BY DAY_OF_WEEK ASC
INSERT INTO PLACE_HOURS ( HOURS_ID, PLACE_NO, DAY_OF_WEEK, OPEN_TIME, CLOSE_TIME, BREAK_STRAT_TIME, BREAK_END_TIME, LAST_ORDER, IS_CLOSED ) VALUES ( SEQ_HOURS_ID.NEXTVAL, #{placeNo}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime}, #{breakStratTime}, #{breakEndTime}, #{lastOrder}, #{isClosed} )
SELECT PLACE_NO, PLACE_CONTENT_ID, PLACE_CATEGORY FROM PLACE WHERE PLACE_CONTENT_ID IS NOT NULL ORDER BY PLACE_NO
